title: BP-XXX enforcement-contract meta-schema (RFC-008 R2, R3, R4)
description: Meta-schema for patterns/bp-XXX.json contract instances (P2 data). Each contract declares three per-pattern classification gates (plan_approval, pre_checkpoint, post_checkpoint) as capability tiers, a root-level stop marker-state gate tier (F2/F10 — never per-label), and the taxonomy/events version bindings (F8/F37). enforce-contract.mjs computes effective_tier = min(harness_cap, contract_tier, project_config) per gate.

id.description: Stable contract identifier, e.g. bp-001. Optional at the P0 meta-schema level (the RFC normative contract shape omits it); validated when present. P2's validate-bp-contract.mjs MAY require it.

gates.description: Exactly three classification gates. Per-gate value is the contract's declared capability tier (F2/F10).

stop.description: Root-level marker-state gate (reads marker state, not command labels — F2/F10). Never per-label.

sha256Version.description: sha256: + hex digest over the canonical id-sorted source array (F8 for taxonomy, F37 for events).
